zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson於1638年出生在瑞典尼亞 斯維利時，她的父親Sven Gunnarsson28歲，母親Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg26歲。她於1654年與Jonas Nilsson在美國德拉瓦州劍橋大學默里 卡素結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1695年在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞金辛享年57歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞 蒙利 梅廷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson于1638年出生在瑞典尼亞 斯維利时，她的父亲Sven Gunnarsson28岁，母亲Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg26岁。她于1654年与Jonas Nilsson在美国特拉华州劍橋大學默里 卡素结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1695年在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞金辛享年57岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞 蒙利 梅廷。

nameMeanings.name: Gunnarsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Agust, Lennart, Nils, Sven, Thor.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish and Icelandic Gunnarsson: patronymic from the personal name Gunnar, from Old Norse Gunnarr, a compound of gunn ‘battle’ + arr ‘warrior’. Compare Gunderson and Gunnerson .
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Gunnarsen, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gunderson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Gundersen or its cognate Gunnersen (see Gunnerson ), and also of Swedish and Icelandic Gunnarsson (see Gunnarson ). This form of the surname is also found in Sweden (also Gundersson), but it is very rare there.

variants.name: Gunnerson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish and Icelandic Gunnarsson (see Gunnarson ) and of the Norwegian and Danish cognates Gunnersen or Gundersen . Compare Gunderson .

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

historicEvents.description: Queen Christina abdicated throne. Converted to Catholicism, later buried in Rome in St. Peter's.

historicEvents.title: Treaty of the Pyrenees between Spain and France
historicEvents.description: The Catalan counties of Roussillon and the northern half of Cerdanya were ceded to France.

Historical Boundaries: 1682: Pennsylvania, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1685: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States
King Charles II barred Jews from settling in Stockholm.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson was born in 1638, in New Sweden, Sweden, her father, Sven Gunnarsson, was 28 and her mother, Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg, was 26. She married Jonas Nilsson in 1654, in New Castle, Delaware, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1695, in Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 57, and was buried in Philadelphia Monthly Meeting, Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson est née en 1638, à Nya Sverige, Suède, son père, Sven Gunnarsson, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Jonas Nilsson en 1654, à New Castle, Delaware, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1695, à Kingsessing, Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Philadelphia Monthly Meeting, Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson 1638 in Nya Sverige, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sven Gunnarsson 28 und ihre Mutter Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg 26. Sie hat 1654 in New Castle, Delaware, Vereinigte Staaten Jonas Nilsson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1695 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Philadelphia Monthly Meeting, Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson è nata il nel 1638 nel Nya Sverige, Svezia, sua padre, Sven Gunnarsson, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Jonas Nilsson nel 1654, nel New Castle, Delaware, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1695, nel Kingsessing, Filadelfia, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Philadelphia Monthly Meeting, Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarssonが1638年にスウェーデンニーア スバーイッジで生まれた時，父Sven Gunnarssonは28歳，母Briggetta Matteson Jestenbergは26歳であった。1654年にアメリカ合衆国デラウェア州ニュー カストルでJonas Nilssonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1695年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアキングセシングで57歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアフィラデルフィアフィラデルフィア モンスリー メエティングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson(이)가 1638년 스웨덴 니아 스버리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sven Gunnarsson(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1654년 미국 델라웨어 주 뉴 카스틀에서 Jonas Nilsson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1695년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 킨그세징에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 필라들필아 필라들필아 몽h리 메틴그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson nasceu em 1638, em Nya Sverige, Suécia, seu pai, Sven Gunnarsson, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Jonas Nilsson em 1654, em New Castle, Delaware, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1695, em Kingsessing, Filadélfia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Philadelphia Monthly Meeting, Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson родилась в 1638 г. в местности ня свиридж, Швеция, её отцу по имени Sven Gunnarsson было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jonas Nilsson в 1654 г. в местности ню кастл, Делавэр, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1695 г. в местности кингсессинг, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности филаделфя монтли митинг, филаделфя, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson nació en 1638, en Nya Sverige, Suecia, su papá, Sven Gunnarsson, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jonas Nilsson en 1654, en New Castle, Delaware, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1695, en Kingsessing, Filadelfia, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Philadelphia Monthly Meeting, Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
